title: OpenPaC BlueMap - Remapped Forge
description: Unofficial Forge Port of OpenPaC BlueMap - Remapped
body:
An Unofficial Forge Port of [https://modrinth.com/mod/openpac-bluemap-remapped](https://modrinth.com/mod/openpac-bluemap-remapped) which is a fork of [https://modrinth.com/mod/opac-bluemap](https://modrinth.com/mod/opac-bluemap)

Credit to SnowyLynn and Gaming32 respectively for their code

_Usage and Reupload permitted under MIT License?_

**Note**
this hasn't been thoroughly tested and I just felt this could be good for anyone who wants it, may or may not be maintained either, also im not really a modder, just wanted to try this.
